description_long: This is a dark brown glass beer bottle with a long neck and a black crown cap. The front label is light blue with ornate borders and black and gold text, giving it a classic, traditional appearance. The label wraps partially around the bottle, with additional information and a barcode visible on the back. The bottle has a slightly bulbous base and a smooth, glossy surface that reflects light. The neck features a matching blue label with additional branding and details. The overall design is elegant and typical of premium non-alcoholic beers.
description: A dark brown glass beer bottle with a light blue, ornate label and a black crown cap. The bottle has a glossy finish and classic styling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ornate blue label with black and gold text and the black crown cap.
description_view_1: Three-quarter rear view revealing the side of the label and the smooth, dark glass surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the barcode and back label details, with the bottle's dark glass dominating.
description_view_3: Three-quarter rear view from the opposite side, showing the edge of the front label and the neck label.
attribute_graphic_design: The label features a light blue background with ornate gold and black borders, classic serif typography, and decorative flourishes. The design is traditional and elegant, with a focus on clarity and premium appeal.
